notes: Send Authorization: Bearer <JWT> on all requests after login.
Upload is multipart/form-data: fields projectTitle, clientOrganisation, optional linkedSowId, plus file.
After upload, poll GET /sow/{sow_id}/upload-status until processing_state is complete (for generation tests).
For generation preview test: POST /sow/{sow_id}/extraction-items/accept-all then PATCH each section, mark-complete each, PATCH approval-authorities, POST /sow/{sow_id}/generate.
GET /sow/{sow_id}/commercial-details returns aiGeneratedText once Section A+B are valid and marked complete (aiTechStackReady), OpenAI or mock, and ai_generated_text empty/incomplete.

businessContext.projectVision: Deliver a production-grade customer portal and workflow platform that improves team throughput, auditability, and reliability across regions. Stakeholders require measurable cycle-time reduction.
businessContext.currentState: Workflows are fragmented across spreadsheets, email, and legacy tools.
businessContext.desiredFutureState: Single integrated system with automation, role-based access, and clear ownership.
businessContext.definitionOfSuccess: Executive sign-off on go-live criteria and KPI dashboard showing adoption and SLA compliance.

techIntegrations.technologyStack: Python FastAPI backend, React SPA, PostgreSQL, Redis cache, Docker, AWS ECS, OAuth2 SSO with Okta.
